name: Python 3
updateContentCommand: [ -f packages.txt ] && sudo apt-get update && sudo xargs -r apt-get install -y < packages.txt; [ -f requirements.txt ] && pip3 install --user -r requirements.txt; python3 -c "import sec_refresh, sqlalchemy, aiohttp, yfinance, psycopg2"; echo '✅ Environment ready: requirements installed and smoke test passed'
